task_completion.description: Select the virtual server 'acmecorp.test' in the control panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dropdown menu or active server indicator in the Virtualmin/Webmin interface shows 'acmecorp.test' is selected.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the website options or Apache configuration for the selected virtual server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main panel displays settings for 'Website Options', 'Document Options', or 'Apache Webserver' specifically for the 'acmecorp.test' virtual server.

task_completion.description: Set 'promo.html' as the primary default file for the Directory Index.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Default website document' or 'Directory Index' text field, 'promo.html' is typed as the very first entry.

task_completion.description: Ensure 'index.php' remains as a fallback in the Directory Index list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the same 'Default website document' or 'Directory Index' text field, 'index.php' is listed after 'promo.html'.
The radio button, dropdown, or checkbox for 'Directory listing enabled?', 'Generate directory indexes?', or 'Options: Indexes' is set to 'No', unchecked, or explicitly removed.
The 'Save' button is clicked, and a success message is displayed, or the 'Apply Changes' button (often in the top right) is clicked to reload the Apache configuration.

integrity.description: The agent used the web-based GUI to configure the server.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Virtualmin/Webmin web interface being used, not a terminal window editing configuration files directly (e.g., using nano or vim on Apache config files).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual configuration forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Values like 'promo.html' are entered into the proper form fields in the control panel, not just written in a text document, search bar, or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open to manipulate the HTML of the control panel to falsely show success.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Domain: acmecorp.test. Target index: promo.html. Fallback index: index.php. Test subdirectory: assets. Promo string: PROMO_2024_LAUNCH. The agent must configure the web server so that 'promo.html' is the primary index, 'index.php' is a fallback, and directory listing is disabled (which would cause the 'assets' directory to return a 403 error).
